response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most recent work centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in web and GIS contexts; while they have a brief C++ mention from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial IoT protocols required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across diverse technologies and platforms
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Extensive background in event-driven systems and distributed architectures
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL development in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or OT protocols
No demonstrable experience with cloud-native industrial platforms or real-time embedded systems
